comment.body: This morning, I somehow missed Alma's signal at the top to buy puts.  But this past weekend, I'd outlined in my notes her last 4 weeks' weekly posts, and I also outlined her daily this morning (and yesterday morning the same).  Based on this, my premarket plan had two trades planned.  One was "build lifeboat at top" and I bought delta 22 puts for Friday expiration nearly to the top tick.  If I can do this, any of us can.  Alma, we are learning and thank you for your time and patience teaching us!!!
